sections.sectionTitle: Reuben, Gad, leh Manasseh , Jordan Nisuahna Lamah Teng

verses.text: Reuben minamte leh Gad minamte in ganhing hon tampi nei uh hi. Amaute in Jazer gam leh Gilead gam a muh uh ciangin gan khawina ding munin hoihsa mahmah uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Gad minamte leh Reuben minamte pai-in Moses leh siampi Eleazar leh mihon makaite kiangah
“Ataroth, Dibon, Jazer, Nimrah, Heshbon, Elealeh, Sebam, Nebo, leh Beon
Topa in Israel mihonte a hong luahsak gamte pen a gan gam hi a, na nasem kote in gan ka nei uh hi
Nong hehpihna-un hih gam hong pia un la, Jordan kantanin kote hong paipih kei un,” a ci uh hi
Ahih hangin Moses in Gad minamte leh Reuben minamte tungah, “Note hih laitakah om hithiatin na sanggamte uh gal sungah kuan ding ahi hiam
Topa in amaute a piakna gamah a paina ding uhah Israel mite bang hangin lungkiasak ding na hi uh hiam
Na pu na pate uh Kadeshbarnea panin gam vel dingin ka sawl lai-in zong tu-a mah a bang uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute Eshkol Kuam-ah paito-in tua gam a muh uh ciangin, Topa in amaute a piakna gamah a paina ding uhah Israel mite lungkiasak uh hi
Tua hunin Topa heh mahmah ahih manin amah kiciamin

‘Amaute in kei hong zui taktaklo uh ahih manin Egypt gam pan a paikhia mite kum sawmnih panin a tungsiah peuhmah khat beek in, Abraham, Isaac, leh Jakob tungah piak dingin ka ciamsa gam mulo ding uh hi
Ahi zongin Kenaz mi Jefunneh' tapa Kaleb leh Nun' tapa Joshua in Topa zui taktak uh ahih manin a mu ding uh hi,’ ci hi
Israel mite tungah Topa heh a, ama muhna-ah siatna a gamta tua khangmi khempeuh a bei mateng kum sawmli sung gamlakah amaute vak kawikawisak hi
En un, Israel mite tungah Topa' hehluatna a khangsakto lai dingin, na pu na pate uh' tangin hong khang na hi uh hiam
Bang hang hiam cih leh amah zuihna panin note na pial uh leh amah in gamlakah amaute nusia kik ding a, note pen hih mi khempeuh a susia na hi ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin ama kiang nai-ah amaute hong pai-in, “Hih lai-ah ka tuute uh-a' dingin tuukhawkte bawlin, ka zi ka tate uh-a' dingin khua ka sat ding uh a

ahih hangin kote in hiam tawi-in amau' munah Israel mite ka tun'pih mateng uh amau' mai-ah a pai dingin ka kiging ding uh hi. Tua kikal sungin hih gam sungah a teng mite' kiang pan kihutna dingin khuapi muan'huai sungah ka zi ka tate uh a na om ding uh kisam hi
Israel mite in amau' luah ding ciat a luah khit matengun ka inn uhah ka ciah kei ding uh hi
Jordan galkhat leh tua ban siahah amaute tawh ka luah khawm kei ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Jordan hih lamgal nisuahna lam kote' luah hong suak hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses in amaute kiangah, “Note, tu-a bangin gamta-in, galdo dingin Topa' mai-ah a pai dingin hiam la-in
Topa in a mai panin a galte a hawlkhiat matengin hiam a tawi note khempeuh in ama mai-ah Jordan kantanin

Topa' mai-ah leitang a kilak matengin na om uh leh, Topa leh Israel mite-a' ding na sep ding teng uh a zo khin na hih manun note na ciahkik ding uh a, hih leitang pen Topa' mai-ah note' neihsa hi ding hi
Ahih hangin note tua bangin na gamtat kei uh leh, en un, Topa' tungah a khial khin na hi uh hi. Na khialhna un note hong sulzuih ding theitel un
Na zi na tate uh-a' dingin khuapite satin, na tuute uh-a' dingin tuukhawkte bawl un la, na ciamsa bangun gamta un,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Gad minamte leh Reuben minamte in Moses kiangah, “Ka topa' thupiak bangin na nasemte ka gamta ding uh hi
Ka tate uh, ka zite uh, ka tuuhonte uh leh ka ganhing khempeuhte uh Gilead gam khuapite-ah na om ding uh hi
Kote' topa in nong thupiak bangin na nasemte, galdo dingin hiam a tawi thei khempeuh, galdo dingin Topa' mai-ah ka galkah ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses in amaute' thu tawh kisai-in siampi Eleazar' tung leh Israel minam beh lutang khempeuh tungah thu a pia hi

Moses in amaute tungah, “Gad minamte leh Reuben minamte, Topa' mai-ah galdo dingin hiam a tawi thei khempeuh in note tawh Jordan kantanin tua gam hong zawhpih leh, Gilead gam a neih dingun amaute tungah na pia ding uh hi
Ahih hangin hiam tawi-in note tawh hong galkah kei uh leh zong amaute in Kanaan gam sungah note mah bangin ngah nei veve ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Gad minamte leh Reuben minamte in dawng uh a, “Topa aw, Topa' thupiak bangin kote ka gamta ding uh hi
Hiam tawi-in Topa' mai-ah Kanaan gam sungah ka pai ding uh a, kote' luah ahi ka neihsa uh Jordan galkhatah kote-a' mahin na kip ding hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Moses in Gad minamte, Reuben minamte, leh Josef' tapa Manasseh minam alangte tungah, Amor kumpi Sihon' gam leh Bashan kumpi Og' gam, a leitang leh a khuapite a gamsung tawh, a gamsunga leitang tunga om khuapi khempeuh a pia hi
Gad minamte in khuapi muan'huai Dibon, Ataroth, Aroer
Atrothshofan, Jazer, Jogbehah
Bethnimrah, leh Bethharan-te satin, tuute-a' dingin tuukhawkte a bawl uh hi
Reuben minamte in Heshbon, Elealeh, Kiriathaim
Nebo, leh Baalmeon (a minte khel ding), leh Sibmah khuapite sat uh a, amau' satsa khuapite' min a thak a phuak uh hi
Manasseh' tapa Makhir-te beh, Gilead-ah pai-in va la uh a, tua sunga om Amor mite suankhia uh hi
Moses in Manasseh' tapa Makhir-te beh tungah Gilead pia a, tua lai-ah amaute a teng uh hi
Manasseh minam sung panin Jair pai-in amau' khuaneute va la a, tuate Havvothjair, ci-in min a phuak hi
Nobah pai-in Kenath leh a khuaneute va la a, ama min tamin Nobah a phuak hi.
